product_overview: ADMAC Site is a public-facing church information portal with dedicated ministry pages and an authenticated admin panel for content management. Admins can update site content stored in Supabase with an offline localStorage fallback when offline.
core_goals: Provide a public site with pages for Home, Ministries, About, Contact and media so visitors can learn about ADMAC.
Enable authenticated admins to create, edit, and publish site content via an admin panel (/painel).
Persist content in Supabase and offer a localStorage fallback when offline so edits are not lost.
Ensure content updates in the admin panel are reflected on the public site as soon as possible.
Gracefully handle media and image URL transformations with fallbacks for unsupported links.

features.name: Ministry Pages (Public Site)
features.description: Public pages for each ministry (Kids, Mulheres, Homens, Jovens, etc.) that display ministry information, schedules, team members and media.
user_flows: Navigate to /kids -> Fetch ministry data from Supabase -> See ministry title and description -> Scroll to schedule section -> View team members list -> Click a media item -> See media viewer or play media

Navigate to /mulheres -> Fetch ministry data from Supabase -> Attempt to transform image URL -> If transformImageLink fails, render placeholder image -> Display a short fallback message indicating missing media

features.name: Admin Panel (Site Content Management)
features.description: Authenticated admin interface at /painel for selecting pages/ministry entries, editing fields (title, text, images) and saving changes to Supabase or localStorage when offline.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Redirect to /painel -> Click Select a page or ministry to edit -> Update title field -> Update text field -> Upload or change image -> Click Save -> Persist changes to Supabase -> See success confirmation -> Navigate to /kids -> See updated content

Navigate to /painel -> Click Select a page or ministry to edit -> Update a field -> Click Save while offline -> Save writes data to localStorage fallback -> See offline saved indicator and confirmation message

features.name: Authentication (Admin Login)
features.description: Login page (/login) that authenticates admins before granting access to the admin panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Receive successful auth -> Redirect to /painel
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill incorrect password -> Click Login button -> Receive authentication error message -> Remain on /login

features.name: Offline Persistence and Sync
features.description: LocalStorage fallback for edits made while offline; attempts to sync local edits to Supabase when the device regains connectivity.
user_flows: Navigate to /painel -> Select a page or ministry to edit -> Make content edits while device is offline -> Click Save -> Write changes to localStorage -> See 'saved offline' indicator -> Return online -> System attempts to sync local changes to Supabase -> See sync success confirmation

Make edits on Device A while offline -> Click Save -> Changes persist to localStorage on Device A -> Open site on Device B -> Navigate to /painel -> Observe original content unchanged on Device B (no cross-device sync) -> See note that offline edits only persist in the current browser

features.name: Media and Image Handling
features.description: Handle image links and media assets with transformation logic and fallbacks for unsupported URL patterns.
user_flows: Navigate to /midia -> Fetch media entries from Supabase -> Attempt to transform each image link with transformImageLink -> If transformation succeeds, display image normally -> Click image to open viewer

Navigate to /midia -> Fetch media entries from Supabase -> Attempt to transform an unrecognized image URL -> transformImageLink fails -> Render placeholder image and show a short accessibility-friendly alt text indicating media unavailable

features.name: Site Content Management
features.description: Manage church information, ministries, and site settings
user_interactions: Select a page or ministry to edit
Update fields like title, text, or images
Click save to persist changes to Supabase or local cache

features.name: Ministry Pages
user_interactions: View ministry info, schedule, and team

known_limitations.issue: Offline mode uses localStorage fallback which doesn't sync across devices
known_limitations.impact: Changes made offline only persist on the same browser

known_limitations.issue: Some images use transformImageLink which may fail if the URL pattern is unrecognized
known_limitations.impact: Images might not load correctly if the URL is not from Google Drive or local path
